touches.ai_summary: Initial LinkedIn outreach to Camila Garcia at AtomConnect. Rep introduced productivity automation solution for sales teams. Camila responded positively, mentioned her team is struggling with manual follow-up workflows and interested in learning more.

questions_asked.question: What kind of productivity gains are your healthcare clients seeing?
questions_asked.answer: Rep shared that similar-sized healthcare IT companies typically see 15-20% time savings on admin tasks, with reps able to focus more on high-value conversations.

next_steps: Camila to check calendar and propose time for intro call next week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent to Camila confirming interest and moving to qualification. Camila replied confirming pain points around rep efficiency and asked about implementation timeline. Rep provided overview of typical 2-week onboarding process.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: Rep explained standard implementation is 2 weeks with dedicated onboarding support, including custom workflow setup and training sessions.

next_steps: Schedule technical evaluation demo for next week
Rep to send use case examples from healthcare vertical

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation demo with Camila Garcia covering automation workflows and reporting features. Camila was engaged and asked detailed questions about sales manager dashboards and workflow customization. She mentioned budget constraints and asked about flexible pricing. Rep walked through 8-seat setup for her team. Some concern noted about needing executive approval but timeline still unclear.

questions_asked.question: Can the sales manager dashboards show individual rep activity and pipeline health in real-time?
questions_asked.answer: Rep demonstrated live dashboard with activity tracking, pipeline velocity metrics, and customizable alerts for manager oversight.

questions_asked.question: How customizable are the automation workflows for our specific sales process?
questions_asked.answer: Rep explained workflows are fully customizable via no-code builder, showed examples of healthcare-specific sequences and follow-up triggers.

questions_asked.question: What does pricing look like for our team size and can we start with a smaller pilot?
questions_asked.answer: Rep outlined standard pricing for 8 seats with automations plus consulting package, mentioned flexibility on phased rollout if needed.

objections: Budget is tight this quarter, need to make sure we can justify the investment to leadership
next_steps: Rep to send formal proposal with pricing for 8 seats
Camila to review internally with her sales manager Chris
Camila to identify executive sponsor for budget approval

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email during negotiation phase. Camila responded requesting significant discount to fit budget constraints. Rep offered pricing concession to move deal forward. Camila confirmed the discounted pricing works and will move to internal approvals, though no executive sponsor has been formally introduced yet.

questions_asked.question: Can you work with us on pricing to get this within our Q2 budget?
questions_asked.answer: Rep offered 32% discount on annual contract to accommodate budget, bringing ACV to $5,700 for 8 seats with consulting included.

next_steps: Camila to present proposal to leadership for final approval
Target close by end of quarter
